headline: Chief Revenue Officer at Broadsign
summary: Passionate about strategy, sales and people. On a mission to create the most data-driven, self-winding and optimized sales organization to best serve our customers.

experiences.title: Chief Revenue Officer
experiences.description: Responsible for all revenue teams globally both Saas and (programmatic) media.

experiences.title: Sr Vice President Global Sales
experiences.description: As a member of BroadSign's senior executive team, I'm responsible for all revenue globally, managing sales teams spread over several continents.

experiences.title: VP Sales EMEA and APAC
experiences.description: Responsible for all activity within the region, building brand awareness, hiring and managing sales-teams.

experiences.title: EMEA Sales Director
experiences.description: Business development within the EMEA region. Building business growth and developing long term strategic relationships for a market leading Digital Signage Software company.

experiences.title: Sales Manager UK - Benelux
experiences.description: Responsible for managing the sales-team in the UK-Benelux region for all productlines; maintaining and growing turnover through existing and new distributions channels and key-resellers and integrators; Leading role in business development into new vertical markets like f.e. Digital Signage.

people_also_viewed.name: Eben Sermon
people_also_viewed.summary: CEO | Transforming Consumer, E-commerce & Marketplace Businesses | Former Head of eBay Europe | Advisor

people_also_viewed.name: Marc HUDAVERT
people_also_viewed.summary: Sr Advisor to PE and Mgmt Consulting firms - NED - Dramatically REDUCE TIME & COSTS of your market & target analysis: FAIL FAST, INCREASE YOUR HIT RATIO

people_also_viewed.name: Julian Eckerle
people_also_viewed.summary: Bringing Agentic Infrastructure to Central Europe

recommendations:
Alexander Pivovarov

Maarten is very professional and experienced manager. I would say he is the best Salesperson I ever met. He can brilliantly communicate the unique features and values of the products and services he offer. I always admire listening to his pitches.

Mathieu Soucy

I had the great opportunity to work in Maarten's team and I must say that he is one of the most driven person I've had the chance to work with. He makes everyone around him better, and he does it by challenging and questioning everything we do to find solution and to bring his team to the next level.

For me personally, Maarten have been a huge influence on the way I approach business, sales and organization.  He personally made me better and gave me a lot of knowledge that I will apply in my new and future endeavors.
